title: Mobile user changes the Lens tenant, the change in the mobile app
scenario: Lens tenant change does not take effect in Poly Studio Mobile app until restart when invite is accepted externally
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Log in with a user account registered on a Lens tenant (Tenant A).
3. Navigate to the Home screen and verify the current tenant information is displayed for Tenant A.
4. Receive an invite to join another Lens tenant (Tenant B) within the app.
5. Accept the invite to Tenant B directly within the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Navigate to the Account or Settings screen, then go to Poly Support → App page.
7. Observe the tenant information displayed on the App page.
8. Log out of the app and log back in with the same user account.
9. Again navigate to Poly Support → App page and observe the tenant information.
10. Now, receive another invite to join a different Lens tenant (Tenant C) via an external source (e.g., laptop browser).
11. Accept the invite to Tenant C using the external source (laptop).
12. Without restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app, navigate to Poly Support → App page and observe the tenant information.
13. Close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app completely.
14. Navigate again to Poly Support → App page and observe the tenant information.
expected: When the invite is accepted within the mobile app (Step 5), the tenant change to Tenant B should take effect immediately without requiring an app restart. The Poly Support/App page should reflect the new tenant information (tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, and app ID) for Tenant B immediately after accepting the invite. When the invite is accepted via an external source (Step 11), the tenant change to Tenant C should NOT take effect until the mobile app is restarted (Step 13). After restart, the Poly Support/App page should reflect the new tenant information for Tenant C.
